column1: # GSE297116 — "Nuclear Argonaute:miRNA complexes recognize target sequences within
# chromatin and silence gene expression". AGO2 miR-eCLIP (Eclipsebio) in HCT116.
# Selection: wild-type HCT116, CYTOPLASM fraction, IP libraries only.
#   - dropped `(input)`: size-matched controls, no AGO2 pulldown, so no chimeras
#   - dropped NLS-AGO2: engineered nuclear-localized AGO2, a different targetome
#   - dropped whole-cell and chromatin fractions (separate sheets)
# The series fractionates AGO2 into whole cell / cytoplasm / chromatin; this is the
# CYTOPLASMIC compartment (the nuclear/chromatin-associated one is in
# Each sample has two SRA runs — one deep run plus a small top-off of the same
# library — which stage 1 concatenates into a single FASTQ.
# READ STATE: assumed already-trimmed like the whole-cell fraction (same submitter,
# same protocol) → skip stage 2, run HybriDetector with IS_UMI=FALSE. VERIFY per the
# project rule by running check_read_state.sh on one run (e.g. SRR33558245) before
# processing; it is a new fraction, not a re-run of an already-checked library.
